summary: Iteration 66: Trade Circle Feature - All backend tests passed (29/29). Frontend UI verified: page loads correctly with Browse/My Listings/My Offers tabs, stats cards, category filters (All/Goods/Services/Both), search input, New Listing button, listing cards with offering/seeking/description, listing detail modal with offers section. Trade Circle accessible via Explore navigation menu and Cmd+K search.
seed_data_creation: Test listings created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 verified Trade Circle barter marketplace feature. Backend: All CRUD operations for listings work (create, read, update, delete). Offer system works (create offer, cannot offer on own listing, cannot duplicate pending offer, accept/decline offers). Stats endpoint returns correct counts. Frontend: Trade Circle page at /trade-circle with Browse/My Listings/My Offers tabs. Create Listing modal has title, category (goods/services/both), offering, seeking, description fields. Listing cards show offering/seeking/description with category icons. Category filters and search work. Listing detail modal shows offers section (visible to owner). Trade Circle accessible via Explore menu and Cmd+K search.

backend_api.POST /api/trade-circle/offers: ✓ Creates offer on another user's listing
backend_api.POST /api/trade-circle/offers/{id}/respo: ✓ Accepts offer, marks listing as traded
backend_api.GET /api/trade-circle/stats: ✓ Returns total_active, total_traded, my_listings, my_trades, pending_offers

frontend_ui.stats_cards: ✓ Shows Active Listings, Trades Completed, My Listings, Pending Offers
frontend_ui.tabs: ✓ Browse, My Listings, My Offers tabs work
frontend_ui.category_filters: ✓ All, Goods, Services, Both filters work
frontend_ui.create_listing_modal: ✓ Has title, category, offering, seeking, description fields
frontend_ui.listing_card: ✓ Shows offering, seeking, description, category icon, user name
frontend_ui.listing_detail_modal: ✓ Shows full listing with offers section
frontend_ui.explore_navigation: ✓ Trade Circle link in Explore menu
